base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of smithy_gang_bosses — a character (boss) from 1996 super mario rpg. Smithy Gang — Mack/Bowyer/Yaridovich/Axem Rangers (color-coded team)/Smithy (final, 2-phase). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
